properties.name: Dangote Refinery
properties.description: Africa's largest refinery. 650,000 bpd capacity producing petrol, diesel, jet fuel. Expected to reduce import dependence.

properties.name: Port Harcourt Refinery
properties.description: Two plants (60k + 150k bpd). Undergoing $1.5B rehabilitation. Nigeria's largest government-owned refinery.

properties.name: Warri Refinery
properties.description: 125,000 bpd capacity. Built 1978. Produces petrol, kerosene, diesel. Rehabilitation ongoing.

properties.name: Kaduna Refinery
properties.description: Nigeria's only inland refinery. 110,000 bpd. Serves northern Nigeria via pipeline from Niger Delta.
